description_long: This bench features a modern, minimalist design with a series of evenly spaced, dark wooden slats forming both the seat and the backrest. The slats are gently curved, providing ergonomic support and a visually appealing silhouette. The bench is supported by robust, arched metal frames on each side, which are mostly concealed by the wooden slats but visible from the side views. The construction appears sturdy, suitable for public spaces, and the materials suggest durability against outdoor elements. There are no armrests, giving the bench a streamlined appearance and maximizing seating space. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, enhancing the natural wood grain and giving the bench a refined look.
description: A modern bench with curved dark wooden slats and concealed metal supports, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved wooden slats forming the seat and backrest, with a clean, uninterrupted surface and no armrests.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the arched metal support structure beneath the slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous alignment of the wooden slats and the solid, enclosed back with no visible supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the curved profile and the partially visible metal frame supporting the wooden slats.
attribute_leg_design: arched metal supports concealed by wood slats
